name: SB37 sponsorship feeler - draft
subject: SB 37-compliant CA auto injury lead funnel sponsorship?
htmlContent:
Hello {{ contact.FIRSTNAME | default: 'there' }},

I am building a California auto injury settlement calculator and wanted to ask whether your firm would be open to a short exploratory conversation about a flat-fee sponsorship or joint-ad placement.

The calculator users are already self-identifying California relevance, injury type, medical bills, lost wages, and attorney status. I am not proposing a per-lead referral fee, exclusive lead arrangement, guaranteed volume, or guaranteed case outcome. Any arrangement would need written terms, attorney review, and SB 37-compliant disclosures with firm identity visible as required.

Open to a 15-minute exploratory call next week? This is only a feeler, not a formal offer.

Best,
Dylan

You can opt out of future marketing emails here: unsubscribe.
